top3.sql:
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" 
FROM frpm 
WHERE "Low Grade" <= 12 AND "High Grade" >= 1 
AND CDSCode IN (
    SELECT CDSCode 
    FROM schools 
    WHERE EdOpsCode = 66
)
ORDER BY "Free Meal Count (K-12)" DESC 
LIMIT 5;

SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" 
FROM frpm 
WHERE "Low Grade" <= 12 AND "High Grade" >= 1 
AND CDSCode IN (
    SELECT CDSCode 
    FROM schools 
    WHERE EdOpsCode = 66
)
ORDER BY "Free Meal Count (K-12)" DESC 
LIMIT 5;

SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
WHERE frpm."Low Grade" <= 12 
  AND frpm."High Grade" >= 1 
  AND schools.EdOpsCode = 66 
ORDER BY frpm."Free Meal Count (K-12)" DESC 
LIMIT 5;

    FROM schools 
    WHERE EdOpsCode = 66
)
ORDER BY "Free Meal Count (K-12)" DESC 
LIMIT 5;
